description_long: This object depicts a small residential neighborhood cluster composed of several modern, boxy houses arranged along a central street and surrounded by numerous leafy trees. The houses are primarily white with flat and slightly sloped dark roofs, and some feature rooftop terraces and visible balconies. A few homes have blue swimming pools in their backyards, adding a touch of luxury to the setting. The arrangement suggests a planned suburban development, with driveways, walkways, and green spaces interspersed between the buildings. The windows are arranged in a mostly regular pattern, and the facades are clean and minimalistic. The overall scene is open and airy, with a focus on contemporary architectural elements and communal outdoor areas.
description: A cluster of modern white houses with flat and dark roofs, surrounded by trees and featuring pools and terraces, arranged along a central street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main street, several houses, and dense tree placement, with clear visibility of the neighborhood layout.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting rooftop terraces, pools, and the spatial arrangement of houses and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, pools, and the alignment of houses with more visible green spaces.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view emphasizing the roof shapes, tree distribution, and the overall compactness of the neighborhood.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryways with flat doors, some with small steps or porches, and clean lines without ornate decoration.
